purpose: Activate 8825 as an app-like system with focus-based sandboxes for different projects

overview.description: 8825 v3.0 operates as an application that must be explicitly activated. Once activated, users can focus on specific projects (sandboxes) with dedicated workflows, agents, and protocols.
overview.architecture: App-based system with modular focus areas (sandboxes)
overview.activation_model: Explicit entry → Focus selection → Sandbox operations → Exit with validation

activation_response.message:
🚀 8825 MODE ACTIVATED

Version: 3.0.0
Workspace: 8825-system

Available Focus Areas:
- Joju (professional library management)
- HCSS (client automation)
- JH Assistant (personal automation)

Commands:
- 'focus on [project]' - Enter project sandbox
- 'create focus [name]' - Set up new project sandbox
- 'list focuses' - Show all available focus areas
- 'exit 8825 mode' - Deactivate system

What would you like to focus on?
setup_actions: Run launch_8825.sh to start all MCP servers

focus_system.description: Focus areas are project-specific sandboxes with dedicated workflows, agents, and protocols

focus_structure.focus_name: Unique identifier for the focus area

joju.name: Joju
joju.description: Professional library management and profile curation

hcss.name: HCSS
hcss.description: HCSS project management with Gmail/Otter ingestion and routing

jh.name: Jh
jh.description: Justin Harmon's personal workspace and projects

list_focuses.output: List of registered focuses with descriptions and status

create_focus.description: Set up a new project focus area with sandbox

exit_focus.description: Exit current focus area (runs focus-specific exit protocol)

exit_requirements: No active focus (must exit focus first)

exit_response.message:
✅ 8825 MODE DEACTIVATED

Session Summary:
- Focus areas used: [list]
- Files updated: [count]
- Protocols executed: [list]

All changes saved. Ready for normal operation.

integration_with_existing_system.migration_path: All focuses now in unified v3.0 architecture
integration_with_existing_system.protocol_references: All existing protocols (decision-making, learning, mining, promptgen) remain active
